name: Banana Berry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin in boiling water. Stir in cold water. Chill until slightly thickened.
2. Mix in 1 cup of the cool whip and 3/4 cup of the strawberries into the chilled gelatin mixture.
3. Pour the batter into a pie crust and chill for about 15 minutes, until firm.
4. Whisk pudding mix into milk.
5. Fold in 1 1/2 cups of the remaining cool whip.
6. Stir in the leftover strawberries.
7. Spread the pudding mixture over the gelatin layer in the pie crust.
8. Chill until set, approximately 2 hours.
